nasb.text: in order that they all may be judged who did not believe the truth, but took pleasure in wickedness.

esv.text: in order that all may be condemned who did not believe the truth but had pleasure in unrighteousness.

cnv.text: 叫所有不信真理倒喜愛不義的人，都被定罪。

ccb.text: 使一切不相信真理、反喜爱不义的人都被定罪。

csbs.text: 好使所有不相信真理而喜悦不义的人，都被定罪。
